name: Amazon Essentials Girls' Long-Sleeve T-Shirts, Pack of 6
desc: 6-pack of long-sleeve cotton t-shirts in a variety of colors. Tagless for comfort, easy to mix and match for school or play.

name: Levi's Boys' 511 Slim Fit Performance Jeans
desc: Slim fit jeans with stretch for easy movement. Soft and durable with an adjustable waistband for a growing fit.

name: Carter's Girls' Fleece Pullover Sweatshirt
desc: Soft cozy fleece pullover with fun graphic prints. Easy to put on and take off, perfect for layering on school days.

name: Amazon Essentials Boys' Uniform Straight-Leg Pant, Pack of 2
desc: 2-pack of classic uniform pants in wrinkle-resistant fabric. Reinforced knees and adjustable waist for growing kids.

name: Hanes Boys' EcoSmart Open-Bottom Fleece Sweatpants
desc: Soft fleece sweatpants with pockets and an elastic waistband. Made with recycled materials for comfortable everyday wear.

name: Adidas Girls' Tiro Track Pants
desc: Classic Adidas track pants with three stripes down the side. Moisture-wicking fabric keeps kids comfortable during sports and play.

name: Amazon Essentials Girls' Uniform Ponte Stretch Skirt
desc: Ponte fabric skirt with an easy pull-on elastic waistband. Comfortable fit perfect for school uniform requirements.

name: Columbia Boys' Steens Mountain II Fleece Jacket
desc: Lightweight full-zip fleece jacket with two hand pockets. Cozy warmth for cool-weather adventures and school days.

name: Nike Boys' Dri-FIT Athletic Shorts
desc: Breathable athletic shorts with sweat-wicking fabric and an adjustable waistband. Designed for sports and active play.

name: Justice Girls' High-Waist Leggings Set
desc: Soft high-waist leggings with colorful prints, perfect for school, dance, and after-school fun.

name: The North Face Boys' Hooded Rain Jacket
desc: Waterproof hooded jacket with taped seams and zip hand pockets. Ready for rainy day adventures and outdoor play.

name: Gap Kids Girls' Performance Training Top
desc: Lightweight training top with moisture-wicking fabric and a comfy relaxed fit for sports and movement.
